# iNNfo â€” Full Site Content

> The hub for the iNNfo ecosystem.
> Generator: https://skills.innv0.com/innv0-web-design-guide

---

# iNNfo â€” the iNNfo modeling hub

Model, edit, and validate iNNfo knowledge models. iNNfo is the hub for the iNNfo ecosystem.

## What is iNNfo?

A monorepo that ties the iNNfo ecosystem together:
- **iNNfo Modeler** (`innfo-editor`) â€” a Vue 3 workspace editor. Open any folder, parse it into one normalized model tree, edit, and validate in the browser.
- **@cognnitive/innfo-core** â€” the shared TypeScript parser, resolver, validator.
- **@cognnitive/innfo-mcp** â€” an MCP server exposing iNNfo as semantic tools for AI agents.
- **Spec Chain** â€” defiNNe -> iNNfo -> Templates -> Models.

## How the iNNfo Modeler works

1. Open workspace â€” pick a folder via the File System Access API (or resume a recent one)
2. Single parse pass â€” one recursive pass folds every `_NN.md` file and its structural children into one normalized tree
3. Edit & validate â€” sidebar tree + block sheets / table view + automatic validation against the iNNfo spec

## Ecosystem Architecture

- Level 0: defiNNe â€” Meta-specification, RFC 2119, versioning
- Level 1: iNNfo â€” Central spec; single-file `_NN.md` models with YAML frontmatter
- Level 2: Templates â€” business, procedures, organization
- Level 3: Models â€” Concrete data instances

## Built for AI agents

- **innfo-mcp** â€” a stdio MCP server with seven semantic tools (`list_models`, `read_model`, `get_spec`, `get_template`, `validate_model`, `apply_change`, `validate_model_url`).
- **traNNsform** â€” an agent-driven import/export pipeline: turn source files into iNNfo models, or export a model to a self-contained HTML visualizer.
- **Use iNNfo with AI** â€” a built-in checklist to connect your workspace to Claude Code, Google Antigravity, or OpenCode.

## Monorepo structure

```
iNNfo/
â”œâ”€â”€ apps/
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ innfo-editor/     <- Vue 3 workspace editor (the iNNfo Modeler)
â”œâ”€â”€ packages/
â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ innfo-core/       <- TS parser, resolver, validator
â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ innfo-mcp/        <- MCP server for AI agents
â”‚   â””â”€â”€ pipeline-gates/   <- Validation & integration gates
â”œâ”€â”€ specs/                <- defiNNe, iNNfo, templates, samples
â”œâ”€â”€ traNNsform/           <- Agent-driven import/export pipeline
â””â”€â”€ docs/                 <- This website
```

---

# About iNNfo

The monorepo that ties the iNNfo ecosystem together.

## Architecture

npm workspaces monorepo â€” one editor app (`innfo-editor`), three packages (`innfo-core`, `innfo-mcp`, `pipeline-gates`), the spec chain (`specs/`), the agent pipeline (`traNNsform/`), and this website (`docs/`).

## App

**iNNfo Modeler** (`@cognnitive/innfo-editor`) â€” a Vue 3 workspace editor with the File System Access API, a single recursive parse pass into one normalized model graph, block sheets / table view / metamodel-driven forms, automatic validation, a graph viewer, matrix grids, and IndexedDB handle persistence.

## Packages

- **@cognnitive/innfo-core** â€” framework-agnostic TypeScript library: the iNNfo parser, model types, IO drivers, validator, and parent-spec-chain resolver.
- **@cognnitive/innfo-mcp** â€” an MCP server (stdio) wrapping innfo-core with seven semantic tools for AI agents.
- **@cognnitive/pipeline-gates** â€” validation and integration gates for iNNfo model pipelines.

## Specifications

- Level 0: defiNNe â€” Meta-specification
- Level 1: iNNfo â€” Central spec; single-file `_NN.md` models
- Level 2: Templates â€” business, procedures, organization
- Level 3: Models â€” Concrete data instances (Ghostbusters, Engineering Team)
